# Stretch Targets — Wisconsin Global Scorecard

> Stretch Targets, Inc. is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization advocating for Wisconsin to set bold, measurable "stretch targets" to improve its economic competitiveness and K-12 education outcomes to world-class levels. The organization publishes a scorecard benchmarking Wisconsin against Minnesota (economy) and international peers (education via PISA/NAEP testing). Based in Madison, WI.

## Pages

- [Scorecard (Home)](https://stretchtargets.org/): The Wisconsin Global Scorecard — a comprehensive benchmarking tool comparing Wisconsin's economic and educational performance against peer states and nations.
- [Why](https://stretchtargets.org/why/): Three key reasons Wisconsin needs stretch targets: economic decline vs. Minnesota, poor international education rankings, and declining quality of life.
- [How Economy](https://stretchtargets.org/how-economy/): Detailed analysis of how Wisconsin can close the economic gap with Minnesota, including GDP, income, and jobs data from the U.S. Bureau of Economic Analysis.
- [How Education](https://stretchtargets.org/how-education/): Framework for how Wisconsin's 426 school districts can reach global-level education performance within 20 years.
- [History](https://stretchtargets.org/history/): The history and evolution of the Stretch Targets initiative, drawing parallels to how great organizations achieve ambitious goals through sustained effort.
- [Approach](https://stretchtargets.org/approach/): Methodology used for economic and educational benchmarking, including data sources (PISA, NAEP, BEA Survey of Current Business).
- [Legislators](https://stretchtargets.org/legislators/): Concrete action points citizens can present to their state legislators and governor to advance stretch targets.
- [WI vs TX Education](https://stretchtargets.org/wi-vs-tx-education/): Demographic-adjusted comparison of Wisconsin vs. Texas education outcomes per OECD testing data.
- [Recent News](https://stretchtargets.org/recent-news/): Latest updates and developments related to the Stretch Targets initiative.
- [Press](https://stretchtargets.org/press/): Media coverage and press resources. Contact for press inquiries.

### How Economy Sub-Pages
- [The Stretch](https://stretchtargets.org/the-stretch/): Getting state leaders to think big — committing to a bipartisan stretch target of matching Minnesota's economic performance.
- [The Implementation](https://stretchtargets.org/the-implementation/): Gathering expert input from industry, academia, and global sources before developing concrete economic plans.
- [The State Government](https://stretchtargets.org/the-state-government/): Staffing state economic development agencies (WEDC) with world-class talent and leadership.
- [The Tactics](https://stretchtargets.org/the-tactics/): Leveraging Wisconsin's existing strengths and identifying future areas of competitive advantage.
- [The Quality of Life](https://stretchtargets.org/the-quality-of-life/): Soft factors (education, environment, housing, diversity) that attract companies and talent to a state.

### How Education Sub-Pages
- [Critical](https://stretchtargets.org/critical/): The need for bipartisan, long-term state-level education targets benchmarked globally.
- [The Classroom](https://stretchtargets.org/the-classroom/): Setting high expectations and global benchmarking standards for all non-special-education students.
- [The Teaching](https://stretchtargets.org/the-teaching/): Raising teacher preparation standards — comparing U.S. admission rates to programs in South Korea, Finland, and Singapore.
- [The Strategy](https://stretchtargets.org/the-strategy/): Strategic upgrading of school districts to achieve global-level academic performance over 20 years.
- [Other](https://stretchtargets.org/other/): Overcoming poverty and family breakdown as barriers to educational achievement, with international examples.

### Utility Pages
- [Sign Up](https://stretchtargets.org/signup/): Subscribe to receive the scorecard twice yearly plus bi-monthly updates.
- [Contact Us](https://stretchtargets.org/contact-us/): Contact form and email (donna@stretchtargets.org).

## Key Facts

- **Organization**: Stretch Targets, Inc.
- **Type**: 501(c)(3) nonprofit
- **Location**: P.O. Box 1298, Madison, WI 53701
- **Website**: https://stretchtargets.org
- **Facebook**: https://www.facebook.com/wisconsinstretchtargets
- **Contact**: donna@stretchtargets.org
- **Focus Areas**: Wisconsin economic competitiveness, K-12 education reform, global benchmarking
- **Key Benchmarks**: Wisconsin vs. Minnesota (economy), Wisconsin/USA vs. OECD nations (education via PISA), Wisconsin vs. other states (NAEP)
